prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约1709→1730→2541→1341→3448名，波动剧烈。2023年大幅后移至2541名，2024年回弹至1341名，2025年因科类调整（理 科→物理类）及计划大幅扩招，位次骤降至3448名，为近五年最低水平（数字最大），2025年基准约3448名；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021–2024 年均为8人，2025年大幅增至22人，2026年进一步扩至27人，较2025年扩招约22.7%。连续两年扩招使竞争压力有所缓解，但扩招幅度边际递减。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985 工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第30名→2022年第29名→2023年第30名→2024年第27名→2025年第25名→2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，综合实 力和品牌影响力不断增强；抖音热度排名第13位（高热），综合热度约387万，短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高。2024年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因 招生电话难以联系、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名，该负面舆情对2025–2026年报考心理可能有滞后影响，部分考生可能因顾虑而转向其他院校。2025–2026年声誉文件 中未出现该校负面事件，舆情趋于平稳；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共7个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A ，其中5个A+学科，农林类学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以农学、动物科学、食品科学与工程等为核心，对应学科均 为A+等级，专业实力突出。社会层面农学类整体热度平稳，但中国农业大学作为顶尖农林院校的品牌效应显著。青海省2026年高考总人数约48000人（不确定标记），按近年物理 类占比约63.9%估算，2026年物理类考生约30672人，较2025年物理类30457人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧。；中国农业大学位 于北京，对青海考生具有较强地域吸引力。该校在青海省招生计划从8人扩至27人，占比虽小但增幅显著，体现对西部省份的倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3448名 、2026年计划扩招22.7%、学校排名持续上升增强吸引力、抖音高热提升关注度、2024年负面舆情有滞后影响、青海物理类考生略增等因素，预计2026年最低位次。预测最低位次约3968名，区间3468–4468名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3968名，区间3468–4468名。位次在区间下限（3468名）附近可重点冲刺一档专业（农学、食品科学与工程类、动物科学创新班等）；位次在区间中段（约3968名）建 议以二档专业为主、一档部分专业冲刺；位次在区间上限（4468名）附近应以三档专业保底为主。中国农业大学农林类学科实力全国顶尖，A+学科数量多，报考时建议优先考虑与 王牌学科对应的专业方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1709 → 1730 → 2541 → 1341 → 3448, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, it dropped sharply to 2541, rebounded to 1341 in 2024, and in 2025, due to category adjustment (from science to physics category) and a substantial expansion of enrollment, the ranking plummeted to 3448, the lowest in the past five years (largest number). The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3448. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province: from 2021 to 2024, it was consistently 8 students, but in 2025, it increased significantly to 22 students, and further expanded to 27 students in 2026, an increase of about 22.7% compared to 2025. Two consecutive years of expansion have eased competitive pressure, but the marginal increase is diminishing.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 30th in 2021 → 29th in 2022 → 30th in 2023 → 27th in 2024 → 25th in 2025 → 24th in 2026, indicating a steady improvement in comprehensive strength and brand influence. It ranks 13th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 3.87 million, high exposure on short video platforms, and relatively high application attention. In 2024, its reputation evaluation was "significantly negative," mainly due to difficulties in contacting the admissions hotline and unreasonable major settings, leading to a drop of about 500 places in the admission threshold. This negative public opinion may have a lagging effect on application psychology in 2025–2026, as some candidates may turn to other institutions due to concerns. In the 2025–2026 reputation documents, no negative incidents involving the university appeared, and public opinion has stabilized. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Grassland Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, and Biology A, including 5 A+ disciplines. The strength of agriculture and forestry disciplines is top in the country, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are centered on agriculture, animal science, food science and engineering, etc., all corresponding to A+ level disciplines, with outstanding professional strength. Socially, the overall popularity of agriculture majors is stable, but China Agricultural University's brand effect as a top agriculture and forestry university is significant. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain mark). Based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates at about 63.9%, it is estimated that there will be about 30,672 physics category candidates in 2026, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Qinghai candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai Province has expanded from 8 to 27 students, a small proportion but a significant increase, reflecting a tilt towards western provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3448, the 22.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, the continuous rise in university rankings enhancing attractiveness, high Douyin popularity increasing attention, the lagging effect of the 2024 negative public opinion, and a slight increase in Qinghai physics category candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 3968, with a range of 3468–4468.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Resource and Environmental Science (Top Innovation Class)
- Animal Science (Future Leading Innovation Class)
- Agriculture (including Agriculture, Seed Science and Engineering)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Plant Protection
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Biomass Science and Engineering
- Animal Science (Companion Animal Direction)
- Bioengineering (Nutrition and Health Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Turf Science and Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering
- Water Resources Engineering
- Chemistry
- Horticulture
- Environmental Science and Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 3968, with a range of 3468–4468. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (3468) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Agriculture, Food Science and Engineering, Animal Science Innovation Class, etc.); those with rankings in the middle range (around 3968) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors while sprinting for some Tier 1 majors; those with rankings near the upper limit (4468) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options. China Agricultural University's agriculture and forestry disciplines are top in the country, with many A+ disciplines. It is recommended to prioritize majors corresponding to the university's flagship disciplines when applying.
